sds-arc-orbit.description: Each child orbits in with stagger delay

sds-aurora-text.description: Six-colour gradient clip sweeps through text

sds-blur-focus.description: Sharpens from heavy blur with tracking

sds-bounce-drop-in.description: Drops in with a squashy bounce

sds-btn-lift.description: Lifts with a growing depth shadow

sds-btn-liquid.description: Background fills from right to left

sds-btn-magnetic.description: Outward pulse ring on a loop

sds-btn-neon.description: Neon box-shadow with a flicker glitch

sds-btn-press.description: Presses down as if physically clicked

sds-btn-shock.description: Outline rings expand outward in a pulse

sds-card-cinematic.description: Wipes open from center via clip-path

sds-card-glow.description: Breathing outer glow on a card

sds-card-holo.description: Rotates on X/Y with hue shift effect

sds-card-magnetic.description: Lifts and rotates slightly in a float

sds-card-portal.description: Flies in from deep Z perspective

sds-card-warp.description: Rotates in from -90° on the Y axis

sds-center-burst.description: Chars start at center, fan out

sds-char-orbit.description: Orbits in from above with rotation

sds-cinema-title.description: Letter-spacing collapses with blur in cinematic style

sds-cipher-reveal.description: Brightness and blur resolve like decryption

sds-depth-charge.description: Deep warp from Z-space with delay

sds-door-open.description: Swings open like a door in 3D

sds-drop-bounce.description: Drops and bounces on the floor

sds-elastic-stamp.description: Scales in from zero with elastic rotation

sds-flicker-on.description: Light-bulb turn-on with stepped opacity flicker

sds-flip-x.description: Flips in on the X axis

sds-flip-y.description: Flips in on the Y axis

sds-focus-pull.description: Camera-focus pull from soft to sharp

sds-fold-down.description: Folds down into view on a 3D hinge

sds-fold-up.description: Folds up into view on a 3D hinge

sds-glitch-flicker.description: Flickering analog noise with slicing displacement

sds-glow-pulse.description: Pulses with a soft neon glow (loop)

sds-gradient-sweep.description: Moving gradient mask over the text

sds-gravity-bounce.description: Falls under gravity, inelastic floor bounce

sds-gravity-drop.description: Falls from above with overshoot bounce

sds-highlight-burn.description: Highlight marker swipes across the text

sds-hologram-text.description: Holographic skew flicker with hue rotation

sds-input-caret.description: Pulsing inner ring emulates caret activity

sds-input-neon.description: Neon glow with flicker on the border

sds-input-plasma.description: Plasma glow cycles around the field

sds-input-ring.description: Magnetic ring pulse on the border

sds-input-shimmer.description: Light shimmer scans across the field

sds-input-success.description: Green glow for a validated field

sds-kinetic-wave.description: Each child bounces up/down in a wave

sds-light-speed.description: Streaks in with a skewed light-speed motion

sds-liquid-rise.description: Rises up with skew and blur in one fluid arc

sds-loader-comet.description: Spinning arc on a track ring

sds-loader-dots.description: 3 dots scale to zero in staggered sync

sds-loader-orbital.description: Two particles orbit at different radii

sds-loader-ping.description: 3 rings expand and fade in cascade

sds-loader-progress.description: Progress bar fills with glowing head

sds-loader-type.description: Monospace text typing in a loop

sds-loader-vortex.description: Conic gradient spins with scale pulse

sds-loader-wave.description: 5 bars scale vertically as a wave

sds-magnetic-drift.description: Circular XY drift like magnetic field pull

sds-neon-flare.description: Pulsing neon glow with colour shift

sds-neon-flicker-in.description: Flickers on like a neon sign

sds-neon-pulse-text.description: Neon text glow that breathes on a loop

sds-perspective-swing.description: Swings in on the Y-axis with perspective

sds-phantom-blur.description: Crystallises from a bright radial blur

sds-pop-in.description: Pops in from zero with a spring

sds-roll-in.description: Rolls in rotating from the left

sds-scatter-return.description: Hover scatters chars, leave springs home

sds-scramble-decode.description: Blurs and skews repeatedly like decoding

sds-scroll-curtain.description: Clips up from bottom like a curtain

sds-scroll-gravity.description: Drops in from above with elastic bounce

sds-scroll-radial.description: Circle expands from the bottom center

sds-scroll-rise.description: Rises up as it enters the viewport

sds-scroll-scale.description: Scales up from 70% with blur resolve

sds-scroll-scan.description: Wipes in from left via clip-path

sds-scroll-slide.description: Slides in from the left with overshoot

sds-scroll-stagger-pop.description: Children pop in with scale+rotate stagger

sds-scroll-tilt.description: Folds down from a 50° X-axis rotation

sds-shadow-lift.description: Lifts up casting a soft shadow

sds-shatter-in.description: Explodes in from massive scale with blur

sds-skew-slide.description: Slides in with a skew shear

sds-slice-reveal.description: Wipes in from left via clip-path

sds-slide-blur-left.description: Slides from left through a blur

sds-slide-blur-right.description: Slides from right through a blur

sds-smoke-reveal.description: Resolves from a smoke-like blur field

sds-split-reveal.description: Polygon clip-path splits open from center

sds-stagger-chars.description: Up to 12 children stagger in with skewY

sds-streak-in.description: High-speed streak entrance from the left

sds-swing-in.description: Swings in with a pendulum overshoot

sds-typing-caret.description: Types out with a blinking caret

sds-unfurl.description: Clip-path inset + scaleX unfurls from the left

sds-vapor-rise.description: Rises and sharpens from a vapor blur

sds-velocity-blur-text.description: Streaks in from left with motion blur

sds-velvet-drop.description: Drops in with a soft blur and bounce

sds-wobble.description: Wobbles side to side on entry

sds-word-blur-in.description: Blur resolves to sharp with scale focus

sds-zoom-punch.description: Punches in from tiny to full with overshoot

sds-btn-fill-rise.description: Liquid sheet rises from the floor with a wobbling top edge, levels off, then ebbs away

sds-btn-fill-sweep.description: Skewed tint sweeps across with a brightness kiss, holds, then exits with momentum

sds-btn-fill-iris.description: Tint blooms from the center as an iris while the button breathes 0.985→1 on a spring

sds-btn-fill-split.description: Two half-fills race from opposite edges and seal mid-button with a decaying flare

sds-btn-fill-corner.description: Tint unfolds diagonally from the top-left corner with a −0.5° settle

sds-btn-fill-drain.description: Fill drains to the floor, pauses empty, then refills — a patient three-act loop

sds-btn-fill-wave.description: A tilted wave climbs in and levels flat while the label bobs once above it

sds-btn-draw-perimeter.description: Border draws itself around the button, clicks at full frame, then fades for the next pass

sds-btn-draw-corners.description: Four corner brackets pop in from outside and snap onto the corners with spring

sds-btn-draw-dash.description: A dashed frame appears segment-by-segment, dims, then solidifies bright before resetting

sds-btn-draw-cross.description: Two diagonal light lines sweep across in opposite directions, crossing mid-button

sds-btn-draw-pulse-frame.description: Frame draws once, then breathes outward with fading echoes

sds-btn-draw-underline-orbit.description: Underline draws under the label, then swings a full orbit and parks back home

sds-btn-press-spring.description: Drops 3px with a squash, then rebounds through a two-step spring — the press you can feel

sds-btn-press-coin.description: Tips 12° like a pressed coin edge while its shaded side deepens, then rights itself

sds-btn-press-pop.description: Anticipation dip, pop past full size, settle — the label leads the button by a beat

sds-btn-press-seesaw.description: Alternating corner tilts decay to rest, like a key that hasn't seated yet

sds-btn-press-drop.description: Falls in from above, lands with a squash and a single dust ring

sds-btn-press-elastic.description: Horizontal tug stretches it wide then tall, snapping back through a three-bounce decay

sds-btn-halo-breathe.description: A soft halo grows and recedes with brightness in sync — calm, steady presence

sds-btn-halo-flicker-on.description: Powers on through three stepped flickers, then the halo blooms and holds

sds-btn-spark-orbit.description: A glowing spark rides the button's outline in a full lap, dimming on the far side

sds-btn-surge-charge.description: Gathers (dims), surges bright with a halo flare, then calms — a three-act energy cycle

sds-btn-halo-split.description: The glow splits into two lobes that drift apart, dissolve, and re-merge each cycle

sds-btn-ember.description: Heat shimmer: micro-skew, warm hue drift, and an ember glow that brightens on the exhale

sds-btn-slice-reveal.description: Assembles as top and bottom edges arrive out of phase, sealing with a brightness flash

sds-btn-slice-hover.description: Top and bottom halves shear apart for two frames like a shutter glitch, then realign

sds-btn-blinds.description: A slatted cover wipes away in four steps, revealing the button like opening blinds

sds-btn-guillotine.description: The top half drops onto the emerging bottom half with a landing squash

sds-btn-shutter-snap.description: A diamond iris pinches almost closed, holds, then snaps open with overshoot

sds-btn-label-slide.description: The label slides up and out, then returns from below with a soft overshoot — a quiet refresh tick

sds-btn-label-wave.description: Label pieces ripple a 2px wave left to right with tiny rotations

sds-btn-icon-launch.description: The icon winds up, rockets forward with motion blur, and glides back as the label leans after it

sds-btn-icon-spin-settle.description: The icon overshoots a full spin (380°→360°) while the label squeezes in sympathy

sds-btn-swap-flip.description: Icon and label trade a crossing gesture — passing each other with a dip, then re-seating

sds-btn-label-typewrite.description: Label pieces type in on a stepped cascade, hold, then clear for the next pass

sds-btn-nudge.description: The trailing chevron nudges forward twice with decaying amplitude — the go-on gesture

sds-btn-tilt-orbit.description: The button leans through a slow elliptical orbit on two phase-shifted axes

sds-btn-tilt-pendulum.description: Hangs from its top edge and swings with natural decay, re-energizing each cycle

sds-btn-tilt-scan.description: Leans corner-to-corner with brief holds, as if scanning for the cursor

sds-btn-tilt-float.description: Levitates with a Y-bob, a 1.2° roll, and a drop-shadow that breathes with the height

sds-btn-sheen-pass.description: A glossy bar sweeps across at a skew with a brightness kiss at center

sds-btn-sheen-double.description: Two sheens cross from opposite ends, flaring where they meet mid-button

sds-btn-prism-edge.description: A spectral border cycles hue while sweeping emphasis around the frame

sds-btn-night-sweep.description: A dark veil wipes off to reveal the lit button, rests, then falls again

sds-btn-spotlight-pan.description: A soft radial spotlight pans corner to corner; the label brightens as it passes

sds-btn-beacon.description: One ring ping every couple of seconds with true rest between — rhythm, not noise

sds-btn-tick-tock.description: Metronome micro-rotation with an end-of-bar accent scale

sds-btn-breath-hold.description: Inhale, hold at the top, quick exhale — asymmetric breathing that draws the eye

sds-btn-wink.description: A corner highlight blinks twice every few seconds, then keeps a straight face

sds-input-label-spring.description: On focus the label lifts with an 8% overshoot and settles small while the field swells a hair

sds-input-underline-draw.description: Underline draws from the center to both edges with a snap of overshoot

sds-input-underline-trail.description: Underline draws left to right behind a bright comet head that burns out at the far edge

sds-input-frame-bloom.description: Four corner accents bloom outward then seat back onto the field, top pair leading

sds-input-tilt-in.description: The field tips toward you on focus while its shadow approaches — a 3D nod

sds-input-zoom-focus.description: Camera-focus on the field: a breath of blur clears as it sharpens and brightens

sds-input-gate-open.description: Two tinted panels part horizontally over the field when it takes focus

sds-input-caret-pop.description: A caret bar pops in at the text start with a double bounce, blinks once, and hands over

sds-input-success-ripple.description: Two green glow rings ripple off the field as it does a contented little bob

sds-input-success-tick.description: A checkmark draws itself in two strokes and snaps at the finish

sds-input-error-quake.description: Caret-safe shake — the frame quakes while the field counter-shifts so your text stays readable

sds-input-error-buzz.description: Three sharp 1px vibrations with a red-shifted flash, then an apologetic settle

sds-input-error-sink.description: The field sinks 2px and desaturates, recovering slowly — the weight of the error

sds-input-warn-tilt.description: Leans one degree with an amber cast, then rights itself — visible uncertainty

sds-input-saved-flash.description: A quick brightness sweep with a 1% stamp-squash — saved, confirmed

sds-input-ph-breathe.description: The placeholder breathes slowly between half-light and dim — alive, not urgent

sds-input-ph-fade-steps.description: On focus the placeholder vanishes in three stepped after-images, like type lifting off

sds-input-ph-ghost.description: On focus the placeholder dips to a ghost, lingers a beat, then lets go

sds-input-ph-flicker-in.description: The placeholder powers on through stepped flickers when the field loads

sds-input-ph-wave.description: Soft irregular pulses roll through the placeholder, like text under water

sds-input-ph-blink.description: A double-blink invitation every few seconds, then a straight face

sds-input-border-comet-loop.description: A glowing comet head rides the field's outline in a steady lap, dimming on the far side

sds-input-border-tide.description: Border emphasis flows around the frame like a tide through four phases

sds-input-border-corners.description: Corners take turns glowing — NE, SE, SW, NW — with a crossfade between each

sds-input-border-static.description: A quiet frame with an occasional two-frame static jitter — idle tech energy

sds-input-border-rain.description: Thin light streaks run down both sides of the field in offset phase

sds-input-border-heartline.description: An ECG blip races along the underline every few seconds, then flatlines politely

sds-input-border-orbiters.description: Two dim satellites orbit the field on opposite sides of its outline

sds-input-fill-rise.description: On focus a tint rises from the floor and settles at a shallow waterline

sds-input-fill-scanline.description: One soft scanline crosses the field on focus, then drifts back and parks at the caret edge

sds-input-fill-meter.description: While focused, a meter advances in confident bursts with holds — progress you can feel

sds-input-fill-corner-shade.description: A shade wedge sweeps in from the bottom-right corner on focus, adding active depth

sds-input-fill-pulse-floor.description: The field's floor pulses brighter on a slow loop while it holds focus

sds-input-fill-flood.description: On focus the interior floods with tint, then drains down to a strong underline — two acts

sds-input-arrive-slide-label.description: The field slides in from the left as its label drops from above, meeting with a synced bounce

sds-input-arrive-unzip.description: The field unzips open from its center line with a bright seam that cools as it spreads

sds-input-arrive-drop.description: Drops in from above and lands with a squash while its shadow snaps up to meet it

sds-input-arrive-materialize.description: Assembles in stepped slices out of blur and brightness, left to right

sds-input-arrive-pendulum.description: Swings in from a top hinge through two decaying swings, then levels out

sds-input-arrive-stretch.description: Stretches open from a narrow pill to full width with an elastic settle

sds-input-arrive-spotlight.description: A dark veil lifts as a spotlight passes over the arriving field

sds-input-arrive-stack.description: Frame, interior tint, and field arrive as three staggered layers

sds-input-idle-floatline.description: The underline drifts gently side to side like a buoy line at rest

sds-input-idle-glimmer.description: A tiny star glimmers at the corner every few seconds, spins a quarter turn, and is gone

sds-input-idle-depth.description: The field breathes in depth — its shadow approaches and recedes on a slow tide

sds-input-idle-lean.description: A barely-perceptible lean cycle, like paper that isn't quite flat

sds-input-idle-noise.description: Film-grain dots shimmer at 7% opacity in stepped jumps — analog quiet

sds-input-idle-perimeter-dot.description: A single dot blinks at each corner in turn, patrolling the field's perimeter

sds-card-tilt-orbit.description: Slow elliptical perspective lean — phase-shifted rotateX/rotateY on a 6 s loop, drop-shadow traces the tilt.

sds-card-layers.description: Children bob at staggered amplitudes (5 px → 13 px) for a parallax depth illusion. Requires child elements.

sds-card-door-peek.description: Card pivots open −18° on its left hinge, holds, then swings shut — like a door ajar.

sds-card-flip-loop.description: Full 360° Y-axis rotation; brightness dips to 35% at the 90° and 270° edges, elastic overshoot on landing.

sds-card-carousel-step.description: Cycles through four yaw poses (0°, −30°, −60°, −90°) with held pauses — mimics a rotating carousel.

sds-card-dive.description: Entrance from overhead: rotateX 65° + upward translate, blur clears on two-stage deceleration brake.

sds-card-float-gimbal.description: Gentle levitation loop with micro counter-rotations on both axes — stabiliser-gimbal quality.

sds-card-iris-bloom.description: Iris opens from an off-centre point with a brightness flare at full aperture, then settles.

sds-card-diagonal-wipe.description: Polygon clip sweeps diagonally from left; a 2 px brightness seam rides the clip edge at reveal.

sds-card-shutter.description: Five stepped horizontal reveals — mechanical shutter feel via steps(5) clip-path inset.

sds-card-spiral-reveal.description: Radar wedge sweeps 360° clockwise from 12 o'clock, revealing the card as it goes.

sds-card-letterbox.description: Cinematic black bars part vertically while card content scales 1.04 → 1.

sds-card-tear.description: Jagged clip-path rips diagonally from the top-left corner with a paper-curl rotate.

sds-card-checker.description: Four quadrant children scale in as two alternating diagonal pairs. Requires 4 child elements.

sds-card-reveal-stack.description: Children slide up from beneath with 100 ms stagger — like cards fanning out of a deck.

sds-card-curtain-fall.description: A dark curtain drops from above, holds, then retracts to reveal the card — theatre-stage entrance.

sds-card-accordion-in.description: Children unfold sequentially from scaleY(0) at the top — like opening accordion panels.

sds-card-fan-spread.description: Children rotate out from their shared bottom-left corner with stagger — playing-card fan open.

sds-card-content-flood.description: Diagonal clip-path floods from the top-left corner, filling the card in two sweeping phases.

sds-card-unpack.description: Card spring-expands from a compressed scaleY(0.25) / rotateX state — box-opening effect.

sds-card-border-beam.description: Single light bead orbits the card border continuously via CSS Motion Path (offset-path: border-box).

sds-card-frame-draw.description: The card's border ring is drawn in left to right via clip-path — drawn-on feel.

sds-card-corner-charge.description: Diagonal corner pairs (top-right + bottom-left) flash in alternating rhythm — energy charge effect.

sds-card-edge-scan.description: Gloss scan line sweeps across top then bottom edge in sequence — scanner/lidar aesthetic.

sds-card-frame-breathe.description: The card's border ring pulses opacity and blur in a slow 2.4 s breath cycle.

sds-card-border-tide.description: Twin light beads 180° apart chase each other around the border — tidal wave pattern.

sds-card-glass-frost.description: Blur + brightness frost cycle — card appears to ice over and clear on a 3.5 s loop.

sds-card-lens-bulge.description: Subtle scale + perspective pulse that mimics a magnifying lens swelling and receding.

sds-card-hue-shift.description: Full 360° hue-rotate sweep — prismatic rainbow wash cycling through the card.

sds-card-refract-slide.description: Diagonal caustic-light beam (blurred 135° gradient) slides across the card surface.

sds-card-crystal-pulse.description: Brightness + contrast + scale pulse — card catches light like a crystal facet.

sds-card-glass-wipe.description: Frosted-glass strip (blurred translucent slab) sweeps across the card with a skew.

sds-card-stack-pop.description: Card lifts from its stack with rising translateY and a growing drop-shadow on a 2.2 s loop.

sds-card-shuffle-deal.description: Entrance: card is dealt from upper-left with a diagonal translate and −14° rotation.

sds-card-deck-peek.description: Two ghost cards peek from behind the main card with staggered offset-rotate on a loop.

sds-card-deck-cycle.description: Perspective yaw cycle — card tips 22° and returns, mimicking thumbing through a deck.

sds-card-stack-drop.description: Entrance: card drops from 38 px above with a two-stage deceleration brake.

sds-card-deal-arc.description: Entrance: card arcs in from upper-left with −18° rotation — classic card-deal motion.

sds-card-bounce-in.description: Entrance from below with spring overshoot — 5-stage oscillation settles at rest.

sds-card-elastic-drop.description: Drops from 55 px above with 3-cycle scaleY oscillation — bungee-cord physics.

sds-card-slingshot.description: Launched from lower-left on a diagonal arc with deceleration overshoot and settle.

sds-card-rubber-band.description: scaleX/scaleY squeeze-stretch alternation — rubber-band snap entrance.

sds-card-free-fall.description: Gravity-curve fall from 64 px above; blur clears on a two-stage deceleration.

sds-card-pinball.description: Enters with 4 direction changes and rotation damping — pinball ricochet physics.

sds-card-snap-back.description: Overshoots right, snaps back left with rotation settle — stretched-elastic return.

sds-card-idle-breathe.description: Micro scale pulse 1 → 1.018 — barely perceptible ambient breath.

sds-card-idle-sway.description: Slow ±6 px lateral sway on a 4 s ease-in-out loop.

sds-card-idle-bob.description: Gentle 8 px vertical float — calm levitation ambient.

sds-card-idle-pulse.description: Scale + opacity pulse — subtle attention-seeking ambient loop.

sds-card-idle-glow.description: drop-shadow glow breathes in and out on a 2.8 s loop.

sds-card-idle-rock.description: ±2° rotation rock — gentle pendulum ambient on a 3.5 s loop.

sds-loader-dots-wave.description: Four dots ripple up and down in a cascading wave.

sds-loader-dots-fade.description: Four dots pulse in and out of opacity in sequence.

sds-loader-dots-flip.description: Four dots perform a staggered rotateY flip.

sds-loader-dots-bounce.description: Four dots bounce with a gravity arc in sequence.

sds-loader-dots-expand.description: Four dots scale in and out in a rolling sequence.

sds-loader-blob.description: A polygon morphs through organic rounded shapes continuously.

sds-loader-bubble.description: A ring expands outward and fades as if a bubble popping.

sds-loader-dual-ring.description: Two concentric rings spin in opposite directions.

sds-loader-ring-split.description: Two opposing half-arcs counter-rotate around the same circle.

sds-loader-spin-dot.description: A bead orbits a faint ring via offset-path.

sds-loader-ring-chase.description: Two arc beads chase each other around the ring.

sds-loader-eclipse.description: Two discs slide past each other creating an eclipse effect.

sds-loader-halo.description: Two staggered rings expand outward and fade like a halo pulse.

sds-loader-fill-bar.description: A progress bar fills from left to right then fades and resets.

sds-loader-bar-pulse.description: A bar breathes by scaling its width from narrow to full.

sds-loader-bar-swing.description: A bright sliver slides from one end of a track to the other.

sds-loader-track.description: A dot races back and forth along a horizontal rail.

sds-loader-stripes.description: Diagonal stripes scroll continuously along a bar.

sds-loader-equalizer.description: Four bars animate to different heights like an audio equalizer.

sds-loader-morph-geo.description: A shape morphs through square, diamond, and circle via clip-path.

sds-loader-fold.description: A square folds in 3D perspective cycling through each axis.

sds-loader-pinwheel.description: Four petal-dots fade in sequence around the cardinal positions.

sds-loader-coil.description: Three nested arcs spin at different speeds creating a coil illusion.

sds-loader-flip-card.description: A rectangle flips on its Y axis like continuously turning a card.

sds-loader-diamond.description: A diamond rotates 180° while pulsing scale and opacity.

sds-loader-squares.description: Four squares in a 2×2 grid pop in and out in a rolling sequence.

sds-loader-isocube.description: A square spins on a tilted perspective axis like a 3D cube.

sds-loader-metronome.description: A thin bar pivots left and right from its base like a metronome.

sds-loader-tape.description: A ball squashes on landing and stretches on lift in a bounce loop.

sds-loader-chase-box.description: A bead races continuously along the host border via offset-path.

sds-loader-windmill.description: Four rectangular blades fade in sequence at the cardinal positions.

sds-loader-glow-pulse.description: A dot radiates a breathing drop-shadow glow that expands and contracts.

sds-loader-neon-flicker.description: A bar sputters with neon flicker like a fluorescent tube warming up.

sds-loader-scanner.description: A horizontal scan line sweeps down through a bordered box.

sds-loader-spotlight.description: A conic gradient wedge sweeps in a circle like a rotating spotlight.

sds-loader-beam.description: A bar wipes in from the left then exits to the right via clip-path.

sds-loader-blur-pulse.description: A dot dissolves in from a blur then fades back out.

sds-loader-timer.description: A pie-fill sweeps around a circle like a countdown clock.

sds-loader-cursor.description: A thin bar blinks on and off like a text insertion cursor.

sds-loader-bounce-bar.description: Four bars bounce upward in sequence like bouncing columns.

sds-loader-ripple-dot.description: A central dot radiates two concentric expanding ring waves.

sds-loader-yo-yo.description: A ball drops, mini-bounces at the bottom, then snaps back up.

sds-loader-swivel.description: A dot oscillates side to side with an ease-out-and-back timing.

sds-loader-gear.description: A jagged gear polygon rotates continuously like a mechanical cog.

sds-loader-drop.description: A teardrop shape falls, squashes flat on impact, then lifts off.

sds-loader-ticker.description: A rectangle flips on its X axis like a flip-board display tile.

sds-loader-expand-ring.description: Three concentric rings radiate outward in staggered waves.

sds-loader-spin-fade.description: Four horizontal bars fade in rotational sequence like a spinner.

sds-loader-throb.description: An energetic overshoot pulse — more forceful and abrupt than breath.

sds-scroll-zoom-in.description: Element scales up from 50% while fading in.

sds-scroll-zoom-out.description: Element scales down from 135% while fading in.

sds-scroll-rotate-in.description: Element rotates from −8° and rises while fading in.

sds-scroll-hinge-in.description: Element hinges open from its top edge like a trap door.

sds-scroll-roll-in.description: Element slides in from the left while rotating into place.

sds-scroll-rise-right.description: Element rises diagonally from the lower-left while fading in.

sds-scroll-cinematic.description: Letterbox bars open outward from the center as the element reveals.

sds-scroll-kaboom.description: Element explodes into view from zero scale with an overshoot pop.

sds-scroll-lean.description: Element leans in from the right in perspective then snaps upright.

sds-scroll-peel.description: Element peels upward from its bottom edge like a sticker lifting.

sds-scroll-stretch.description: Element stretches out from a narrow vertical sliver to full width.

sds-scroll-jello.description: Element bounces in with a wobbly jello-like scale and skew oscillation.

sds-scroll-flip-up.description: Element hinges open from its bottom edge like a trap door swinging up.

sds-scroll-door-left.description: Element swings open from its left edge like a door on a left hinge.

sds-scroll-door-right.description: Element swings open from its right edge like a door on a right hinge.

sds-scroll-barrel.description: Element tumbles in with a diagonal barrel-roll 3D rotation.

sds-scroll-saturate.description: Element transitions from grayscale to full color while fading in.

sds-scroll-sepia.description: Element transitions from sepia tone to full color while fading in.

sds-scroll-overexpose.description: Element burns in from an overexposed flash to natural brightness.

sds-scroll-thermal.description: Element resolves from a thermal hue-shift and high saturation to natural color.

sds-scroll-iris.description: A circular iris expands from the center to reveal the element.

sds-scroll-wipe-up.description: Element is revealed by a clip-path that wipes upward from the bottom.

sds-scroll-wipe-right.description: Element is revealed by a clip-path that wipes across from left to right.

sds-scroll-drop-in.description: Element drops from above and bounces into its final position.

sds-scroll-float.description: Drifts up 6px with a soft blur dissolve — weightless and ethereal.

sds-scroll-sink.description: Settles gently downward from above while fading in.

sds-scroll-shudder.description: Shakes horizontally on entry then vibrates to a stop.

sds-scroll-spin-y.description: Spins in with a 180° rotateY perspective rotation.

sds-scroll-rubber-band.description: Squashes and stretches into place with rubber-band physics.

sds-scroll-stagger-fade.description: Children fade in one by one in a staggered sequence.

sds-scroll-stagger-rise.description: Children rise up and fade in one by one in sequence.

sds-scroll-glare.description: Element burns in from a bright overexposed glare to natural.

sds-scroll-skid-in.description: Slides in fast from the right, overshoots, and brakes.

sds-scroll-slingshot.description: Compressed from the left then launched forward with elastic overshoot.

sds-scroll-blink-in.description: Opacity steps up through four discrete levels like a screen powering on.

sds-scroll-stagger-slide.description: Children slide in from the left one by one in a staggered sequence.

sds-scroll-neon-pop.description: Scales in with a burst of neon drop-shadow glow that settles.

sds-scroll-pixel-in.description: Resolves from a heavy blur and slight zoom to sharp full detail.

sds-scroll-tidal.description: Slides in from the left with a wave-like settling oscillation.

sds-scroll-materialize.description: Steps through four discrete opacity and blur levels like materializing digitally.

sds-scroll-exhale.description: Gently scales down from 112% while fading in — like a slow exhale.

sds-scroll-typewriter.description: Reveals in discrete steps from left to right like a typewriter printing.

sds-scroll-glitch-in.description: Tears in through glitch artifacts — hue shifts, clip flickers, and X displacement.

sds-scroll-unfurl.description: Unrolls from the top-left corner with a gentle rotate and scale.

sds-scroll-pop-in.description: Snaps from zero to overshoot then settles with a springy multi-step pop.

sds-scroll-contrast-in.description: Emerges from high-contrast darkness into natural color and brightness.
